pageContext.name: Wolverine: Weapon X
pageContext.description: I been a lot of things in a lot of places — a sickly kid named James Howlett, a killing machine called Weapon X, a 'hero' goes by Wolverine…   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print, a wild and untamed Marvel Comics art print by artist Richard Luong.  Deep in a hidden lab facility, a mutant is tested beyond his limits, turned into a living weapon against his will. This incredible illustration captures that horrifying rebirth, as Wolverine emerges from his Weapon X experimentation. He cuts through the wires and diodes that hold him captive, using his newfound Adamantium claws in a fit of righteous rage. His reddened eyes and savage snarl are all the warning the scientists need to know they've released a deadly beast — the Wolverine is ready to kill.  Each Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this Wolverine artwork is a must-have addition to any fan's X-Men collection!  Unleash the animal within and bring home the Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print by Richard Luong today.
